summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for AI Heart Risk Prediction healthcare dashboard. All major UI components, interactions, responsive design, and animations are working correctly. Successfully validated all 8 required sections including header, hero, health form, image upload, AR visualization, prediction results, precautions panel, and chatbot.

ui_bugs.issue: Risk probability shows 0% even with moderate risk factors, inconsistent with 'Low Risk' classification
ui_bugs.note: This is placeholder calculation logic in frontend-only app, not critical

passed_tests: Header with CardioVision AI logo and heartbeat animation
Hero section with title, buttons, and ECG animation
Health Data Input form - all 5 fields accept numeric input
Predict Risk button submits form and displays results
Image Upload section - upload and capture buttons functional
AR Heart Visualization container with pulsing heart animation
AI Prediction Results section with color-coded risk levels
Precautions Panel displays 3 categories with proper color coding
AI Health Assistant chatbot - chat input, send button, responses functional
Footer displays correctly with all links
Responsive design - mobile menu toggle works
All 27 required data-testid attributes present and functional
